sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14591" key="a)puri/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπυρίτης</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄρτος</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n14591.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loaf,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.33</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
